skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem: A farmer packs eggs into cartons. Each carton contains at least 25 eggs but no more than 35 eggs. Which of the following could be the total number of eggs in 4 cartons?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. With 4 cartons, the minimum total is 4 × 25 = 100 eggs and the maximum total is 4 × 35 = 140 eggs. So any valid total n satisfies 100 ≤ n ≤ 140. Only 130 falls within this range.

Choices A and B are below the minimum of 100. Choice C is above the maximum of 140.
